evaluators.name: 3-Story Denver Office Quote with Shortest Timeline Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a service quote for a 3-floor Denver office with $2,000,000 budget and selected the shortest available timeline option under 12 months.

evaluators.name: Texas Healthcare Case Study Comparison Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added a qualifying large Texas healthcare project (>= $50M, 2021+) to the comparison list, favoring the most recent one.

evaluators.name: Nearest Branch Warehouse Site Visit Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user scheduled a warehouse/industrial site visit at the nearest active branch within 50 km of 94107 in August 2026, using the earliest available morning time slot before 11:00 AM.

evaluators.name: Excavator & Mixer Rental with Damage Waiver Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user rented the correct excavator and concrete mixer for June 1–5, 2026, applied standard damage waiver to both, and viewed the rental summary.

evaluators.name: Industrial Maintenance Plan Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user requested a quote for the correct industrial maintenance plan (up to 2-hour response, <= $1,500/month) with the longest warranty, marking it as an existing facility.

evaluators.name: Cheapest April 2026 Construction Safety Training Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered one participant for the cheapest qualifying construction safety session in April 2026.

evaluators.name: Chicago Warehouse Renovation Estimate & Send Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user generated a cost estimate for a 10,000 sq ft Chicago warehouse renovation with high-efficiency HVAC and >= 15% energy savings, then sent it via the estimate form.

evaluators.name: Design-Build Retail Store Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a design-build inquiry for an ~8,000 sq ft retail store with a $500k–$800k budget, October 2026 start, source=online search, and phone contact 2–4 PM.
